data.name: Oh So Hero!
data.detailed_description:
Oh So Hero! is a furry sextroidvania featuring explicit encounters with a male to male focus (plus some variety). Play as Joe, an average guy on Planet Aeter who enters a tournament where everyone can fight and fornicate. All willing participants use their strength and charms to outmaneuver their opponents and get one step closer to the Emeralds of Power!

OH SO HERO! Act 1

The First Act of Oh So Hero! Aliens invade Aeter! Joe enters the tournament and travels from Sheo Islands Beach to Lood City where he encounters the large dragon, Bates!

Along the way, you'll meet a menagerie of anthropomorphic characters, and embark on a sex-filled adventure to win the mysterious alien Gerrabacco tournament being held on Joe's island!

PLATFORMER + BRAWLER + LEWDER

Joe can run, jump, punch, and do lewder things as well! Choose between strength or charms, or perhaps use a mix of both? Unique animations for every enemy depending on your style! Explore secret paths to unlock new items and find hidden friends.

DOZENS OF CHARACTERS / HUNDREDS OF ANIMATIONS

Oh So Hero! Act 1 features around 300 unique animations! These fluid, hi-res, hand-drawn, explicit animations paired with 2.5D action gameplay makes Oh So Hero! like nothing else out there! Can you make it to the top? Or will you become the bottomest of bottoms?

GALLERY MODE

Use the Gallery to view all animations encountered through gameplay (or just cheat and see them all~). You can also use the Gallery’s Auto-Play Mode for background enjoyment. With over 15,000 frames of hand-drawn, high-resolution sprite animations in Act 1, there's plenty to enjoy!

data.short_description: Oh So Hero! is a lewd furry metroidvania game! Play as the dragonesque Joe to fight and fornicate with your rivals, get intimate with a menagerie of anthropomorphic characters, and embark on a sex-filled adventure to win the mysterious alien tournament being held on Joe's island!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 580 / AMD HD 7870
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or newer
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4670K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 680 / AMD HD 7970
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Sequoia 15.5
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel - Apple M1 or 2.4 GHz 8-Core Intel Core i9
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD Graphics 630 1536 MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS Sequoia 15.5
  • 處理器: Apple Silicon or Intel - Apple M1 or 2.4 GHz 8-Core Intel Core i9
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel UHD Graphics 630 1536 MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 or 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-6100 / AMD FX-8350
  • 記憶體: 3 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 580 / AMD HD 7870
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 18.04 or 20.04
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-4670K / AMD Ryzen 5 1500X
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GTX 680 / AMD HD 7970
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
